audio_pcm_s16_mono_fp32.description: Interleaved signed-16 PCM channels are averaged in ascending channel order and scaled by exactly 1/32768 into mono FP32 samples.

audio_resample_linear_rational_fp32.description: Deterministic linear resampling from exact integer-rate rational coordinates; this reference capability is not a substitute for a future band-limited provider.

audio_resample_windowed_sinc_fp64_accum_.description: Band-limited resampling with exact integer-rate output positions, cutoff=min(1, output_rate/input_rate), a finite Hann-windowed sinc radius, ascending-tap FP64 accumulation, normalization, and FP32 storage.

audio_stft_centered_hann_precomputed_fp3.description: Centered periodic-Hann STFT power using explicit precomputed trigonometric tables and the same ascending-sample FMA order as the scalar direct reference.

audio_stft_centered_hann_fft400_radix20_.description: Whisper-width 400-point centered periodic-Hann STFT power using a fixed 20x20 Cooley-Tukey factorization and precomputed FP32 trigonometric tables. This provider intentionally has a different reduction tree from the direct DFT reference.

audio_conv1d_channel_major_ascending_fp3.description: General channel-major FP32 Conv1D with explicit stride, symmetric zero padding, bias-first accumulation, and deterministic channel/kernel traversal.

layout_channel_to_token_copy_fp32.description: Exact FP32 layout copy from channel-major [C,T] to token-major [T,C].

position_embeddings_add_token_major_fp32.description: In-place token-major addition of learned absolute FP32 position embeddings with no interpolation or reduction.

attention_query_key_scaled_ordered_fp32.description: Equal- or unequal-length head-major query/key attention with explicit query scaling, ordered FP32 QK and PV products, and an FP64 softmax denominator.

audio_whisper_log_mel_reference_fp32.description: Whisper-compatible FP32 reference frontend with PyTorch reflect centering, periodic Hann framing, scalar direct DFT power, explicit Slaney Mel weights, log10 floor, eight-decade clamp, and affine normalization.

gated_deltanet_prefill_ordered_fp32_stat.description: Gated DeltaNet prefill carries one FP32 recurrent state through prompt rows in ascending token order and delegates each update to the exact decode provider.

gated_deltanet_llama_avx2_decode_fp32_st.description: Single-token Gated DeltaNet matching llama.cpp's AVX2 CPU graph: four-vector FMA dot reduction, FMA state update, and query scaling after reduction.

gated_deltanet_llama_avx2_prefill_fp32_s.description: Prompt Gated DeltaNet carries state in token order while invoking the exact llama.cpp AVX2 decode arithmetic for every row.

recurrent_norm_gate_llama_avx2_fp32_outp.description: Qwen3.5 recurrent gated normalization matches llama.cpp's separate RMSNorm, weight multiply, AVX2 SiLU, and final elementwise multiply operations.

rmsnorm_fp32_square_fp64_sum_fp32_output.description: RMSNorm with FP32 square products, an ascending FP64 row sum, FP32 mean and reciprocal square root, and ordered FP32 normalization and weight multiplies.

rmsnorm_llama_cpu_production_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp CPU production RMSNorm: FP32 squares, ascending FP64 row sum, and the active CPU provider reciprocal-square-root sequence. AVX-512 uses RSQRT14 plus one Newton refinement; AVX2 uses scalar sqrt/div.

rmsnorm_pytorch_avx512_bf16_storage.description: PyTorch CPU AVX-512 BF16 RMSNorm: FP32 mean-square reduction, BF16 normalized storage, then BF16 weight multiplication and output storage.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_fp32_dot_fp32_out.description: BF16 weights and BF16-rounded FP32 activation loads with an ascending-K FP32 dot product and FP32 output storage.

bf16_tiled_2d_align_corners_rne_residual.description: Align-corners tiled 2D bilinear position interpolation with FP32 rational coordinates and explicit BF16 RNE product, accumulation, residual, and output boundaries.

fp32_tiled_2d_antialias_half_pixel_contr.description: Antialiased half-pixel FP32 interpolation with contraction enabled and channel-row-column evaluation before merged-tile output, matching the GGML execution contract.

fp32_tiled_2d_align_corners_contracted.description: Align-corners tiled 2D position interpolation with FP32 rational coordinates and contracted float32 evaluation order.

recurrent_qk_l2_llama_cpu_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp CPU L2 normalization: FP32 products, ascending FP64 sum, and epsilon as a minimum denominator.

recurrent_silu_llama_avx2_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp x86 AVX2 SiLU provider, including its vector exponential approximation and scalar tail.

text_mrope_fp32_input_fp32_compute_fp32_.description: Text M-RoPE rotates the configured prefix of each head using one semantic text position expanded across four axis-selection streams.

text_imrope_fp32_input_fp32_compute_fp32.description: Text M-RoPE uses full-width split-half rotation with Qwen-style interleaved temporal, height, width, and reserved-axis selection.

vision_mrope_fp32_input_fp32_compute_fp3.description: Vision M-RoPE uses full-width multi-section split-half FP32 math and stores FP32 output.

vision_mrope_fp32_input_fp32_compute_bf1.description: Vision M-RoPE computes in FP32 and materializes a BF16 RNE storage boundary in the FP32 activation buffer.

vision_mrope_fp32_input_fp32_compute_fp1.description: Vision M-RoPE computes in FP32 and materializes an FP16 RNE storage boundary in the FP32 activation buffer.

layernorm_bf16_storage_fp32_compute_ggml.description: Float-buffer LayerNorm with BF16 input/output storage boundaries and the established ggml matched mean/variance reduction.

layernorm_bf16_storage_fp32_compute_aten.description: Float-buffer BF16 LayerNorm reproducing PyTorch 2.8 GCC 13.3 ATen's AVX2 Welford chunk and cascade structure using explicit intrinsics. Promotion requires the stitched monotonic X-ray gate because compiler contraction can differ by FP32 ULPs.

layernorm_fp32_ggml_chunked_contracted.description: GGML-compatible FP32 LayerNorm with double mean accumulation, ISA-width centered-variance chunks, contracted FP32 arithmetic, and independent-row scheduling.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_fp32_dot_bf16_out.description: BF16 weights and BF16-rounded FP32 activation loads with ascending-K FP32 dot products and BF16 RNE output storage.

q5_k_weight_q8_k_input_avx2_fma_fp32_out.description: llama.cpp x86 Q5_K projection: canonical Q8_K activation quantization, integer sub-block dots, FP32 FMA super-block accumulation, and movehl/movehdup lane reduction.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_native_pair_dot_b.description: BF16 weights and BF16-rounded activations using native paired BF16 dot products, FP32 vector accumulators, pairwise horizontal merge, CK threadpool independent-row partitioning, and BF16 RNE output storage.

attention_bf16_storage_fp32_online_bf16_.description: Full bidirectional head-major attention over BF16-valued Q/K/V, FP32 score/softmax/value accumulation, and BF16 RNE output storage.

attention_bf16_sdpa_tiled512_bf16_prob_f.description: Portable BF16 full attention with 512-key tiles, BF16 probability storage, FP32 tile accumulation and merge, and BF16 RNE output storage.

attention_bf16_pytorch_cpu_flash_amx_exa.description: PyTorch 2.8 CPU flash-SDPA-compatible full attention: FP64-evaluated inverse-sqrt scale narrowed to FP32, 256-query/512-key tiles, oneDNN BF16 BRGEMM using its largest even K block at or below 32 (24 for head width 72), AVX-512 exp_u20 and pairwise lane reductions, BF16 softmax probability storage, FP32 tile accumulation, and BF16 RNE output storage. Diagnose future drift against the complete PyTorch CPU-flash and oneDNN schedule; matching only scale, GEMM, softmax, or storage in isolation is insufficient.

residual_add_bf16_input_fp32_add_bf16_ou.description: Elementwise residual addition of BF16-valued float buffers with BF16 RNE output storage.

attention_gate_llama_sigmoid_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp CPU attention gating evaluates sigmoid as 1.0f/(1.0f+expf(-gate)) before the FP32 attention multiply; the algebraically equivalent sign-stable branch is not numerically interchangeable.

swiglu_fp32_ggml_vector_exp_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp CPU SwiGLU semantics: evaluate GGML's ISA-specific vector exponential, divide gate by 1+exp(-gate), then multiply by up in FP32.

gelu_pytorch_tanh_bf16_storage.description: PyTorch tanh-approximate GELU over BF16-valued inputs with FP32 elementwise compute and BF16 RNE output storage.

gelu_fp32_input_fp16_table_fp32_output.description: llama.cpp CPU GELU semantics: round FP32 input to FP16, index the GGML FP16 GELU table, then widen the FP16 result to FP32.

fp16_weight_fp16_input_llamafile_avx_fp3.description: FP16-weight GEMM matching llama.cpp's AVX llamafile path, including FP16-RNE activation conversion, FMA lane accumulation, and movehl/movehdup horizontal reduction.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_amx_tile32_dot_bf.description: BF16 weights and BF16-rounded activations using AMX 16x16x32 tile dot products, ascending K tiles, independent 2D output-tile partitioning, and BF16 RNE output storage.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_shape_safe_prefil.description: Segmented BF16 prefill provider: aligned M/N/K uses the AMX tile32 contract; short or unaligned text segments use the native paired-dot contract. Both paths round input and output at the same BF16 storage boundaries.

bf16_weight_bf16_input_pytorch_onednn_br.description: PyTorch BF16 Linear parity contract for oneDNN 3.7 OpenMP BRGEMM. The result is deterministic only for a fixed thread count; changing the oneDNN K partition can alter BF16 outputs by one storage step.
